strategy: Team fight (24,500 health). His Luna-Tick minions are polymorphed into ducks (Old Quack, Quentin Quail, Drake Lockley) that punish setup, so coordinate who casts what.
Hit with Fire (+30%); he resists Ice, Myth, and Death 70% and everything else 40%.
Blading is dangerous: universal, off-school, or multi-blades draw Ice Enfeeble from Old Quack, and Aegis will not save the blade. Use single mono-school blades of your own school.

Charms, wards, and traps trigger Quentin's counters (Weakness, Hex, Balanceblade, shields), and any damage charm, trap, aura, or global draws Drake's 800 Storm Duck Savage. Keep setup minimal and clean.
Every third round he Shatterhorns a random wizard, so keep shields refreshed.
Funnel safe mono-school blades to the Fire hitter and burst the boss and ducks together.
cheatNotes: Round 1 he polymorphs the Luna-Tick minions into duck forms, with the count depending on wizards present.
Every third round he casts Shatterhorn on a random wizard.
With no Luna-Tick minions present, Loon Knight polymorphs into one of the duck forms and keeps his own cheats plus gains that form's.
He can polymorph again into another form, stacking both forms' cheats.
Old Quack: a universal or multi-blade draws Ice Enfeeble on the receiver.
A multi-target blade like Bladestorm draws an all-enemies Enfeeble.
Even a normal blade of a school other than your own triggers it.
Blades with secondary effects like Savage Paw do not trigger it.
Aegis will not stop the blade from being removed.
Quentin Quail: certain hanging effects you cast make him cheat-cast a matching counter.
Secondary effects, like the blade on Sound of Musicology, also trigger it.
A single-target helpful charm draws Weakness on the receiver.
A helpful charm on all allies draws Mass Weakness.
A single-target harmful charm on him draws Balanceblade.
Starfall also triggers this.
A harmful charm on all enemies draws Bladestorm (+25%).
A single-target helpful ward draws Hex on the receiver.
A helpful ward on all allies draws Mass Hex.
A single-target harmful ward on him draws a Balance Tower Shield.
Attenuate also triggers this.
A harmful ward on all enemies draws Legion Shield.
Drake Lockley: any damage or pierce charm, trap, aura, or global draws an 800 Storm Duck Savage on the receiver.
Multi-target spells make the Duck Savage hit the caster instead.
Secondary effects also trigger it.
